creator: antiduh@gmail.com
text:
AtomiaDNS is a free/open DNS management package, which includes support for DNSSEC and PowerDNS. http://atomiadns.com/

They have some port tarballs that can used following the instructions here:
http://atomia.github.io/atomiadns/usage.html#usage-master-installation-default-freebsd

The port tarballs need a little updating, but it seems like most of the work has been done.
